# AOE Friendly Links Knowledge Base - Full Index

Generated: 2026-06-18T03:10:14.671Z
Source: https://github.com/aoe-top/api.aoe.top/blob/master/server/utils/friendly.ts
Sites: 37
Captured pages: 1508/1624
Empty text pages: 28
Text characters: 3163996

This is a compact, index-oriented summary for LLM discovery. It intentionally does not inline every crawled page body. Full extracted text remains available in per-page Markdown files and https://llms.aoe.top/api/content.json.

## Content Endpoints

- Overview: https://llms.aoe.top/llms.txt
- Full content JSON: https://llms.aoe.top/api/content.json
- Page metadata JSON: https://llms.aoe.top/api/pages.json
- Site metadata JSON: https://llms.aoe.top/api/sites.json
- Sitemap: https://llms.aoe.top/sitemap.xml

## Full Text Access

Use per-page Markdown links or https://llms.aoe.top/api/content.json for complete captured text. Empty or failed pages remain in metadata APIs for diagnostics but are excluded from this compact index and sitemap page entries.
